tasks.label: Wiki: Check markdown links
args: & { \$root='wiki'; \$md=Get-ChildItem -Path \$root -Recurse -Filter *.md; \$broken=@(); foreach(\$f in \$md){ \$content=Get-Content -Raw -Path \$f.FullName; \$matches=[regex]::Matches(\$content,'\[[^\]]+\]\(([^)]+)\)'); foreach(\$m in \$matches){ \$target=\$m.Groups[1].Value.Trim(); if(\$target -match '^(https?:|mailto:|#)'){ continue }; \$target=\$target.Split('#')[0]; if([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace(\$target)){ continue }; \$resolved=Join-Path \$f.DirectoryName \$target; if(-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath \$resolved)){ \$broken += [pscustomobject]@{File=\$f.FullName;Link=\$m.Groups[1].Value} } } }; Write-Host "BROKEN_COUNT=\$(\$broken.Count)"; if(\$broken.Count -gt 0){\$broken|Sort-Object File,Link|Format-Table -AutoSize} }
